properties.name: furent.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: furent.jwt.access-token-expiration
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: furent.jwt.refresh-token-expiration
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: furent.tenant.default-slug
properties.description: Default tenant slug used when no tenant is resolved.

properties.name: furent.admin.password
properties.description: Admin user password for initial data setup.

properties.name: furent.email.enabled
properties.description: Whether email sending is enabled (false = log-only mode).

properties.name: furent.email.from
properties.description: Default 'from' email address for outgoing emails.

properties.name: furent.features.reviews-enabled
properties.description: Whether the reviews feature is enabled.

properties.name: furent.rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Whether the rate limiting filter is enabled.
